executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Architecture-owned gates are all green. The sole blocker is marketing independent verification which fails closed pending primary-repo outcome evidence.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Switch marketing-workflow-audit model from minimax/MiniMax-M2.7-highspeed to a larger-context provider (deepseek-v4-flash or pro) to resolve the 27-repeat context-overflow escalation.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list --json plus live artifact cross-checks

last_error_details.marketing-momentum-watchdog: gateway restart interruption (consecutive_errors=1, transient, not a real failure)
last_error_details.marketing-workflow-audit: Context overflow: prompt too large for the model (consecutive_errors=2, escalation at 27 repeats, critical)

live_running_job_names: Push research findings to git repo

findings.title: Marketing-workflow-audit escalation at 27 repeats — context overflow persists
findings.mechanism: Health monitor records marketing-workflow-audit_escalation at critical level with 27 consecutive repeats of context overflow failures. The job uses minimax/MiniMax-M2.7-highspeed which has insufficient context capacity for the accumulated prompt.
findings.root_cause: Model context window too small for the marketing-workflow-audit accumulated prompt. Model: minimax/MiniMax-M2.7-highspeed. Timeout: 600s. Last duration: 3023s (5x over timeout).
findings.recommended_fix: Switch marketing-workflow-audit model to openrouter/deepseek/deepseek-v4-pro or flash, or split the audit into smaller chunks.

findings.title: Marketing independent verification still fails closed
findings.mechanism: Marketing independent verification artifact (2026-05-28T10:16 CEST) verdict=fail because primary-repo adoption is still measurement-pending.
findings.root_cause: No measurable primary-repo movement to back a green certification. Reddit channel blocked, Apollo channel blocked, measurement hold active.
findings.recommended_fix: Marketing owner loop must produce fresh outcome evidence with primary-repo movement.

findings.title: Live Gateway topology has 2 last-error jobs (1 transient, 1 real)
findings.mechanism: Direct live cron inspection shows 25 enabled, 0 disabled, 12 running, 2 last-error. marketing-momentum-watchdog has a transient gateway-restart interruption (consecutive_errors=1). marketing-workflow-audit has context overflow (consecutive_errors=2, escalated). The momentum-watchdog error is not a real failure.
findings.root_cause: marketing-momentum-watchdog: gateway restart transient. marketing-workflow-audit: model context limit.
findings.recommended_fix: Separate transient gateway-restart errors from real application errors in health monitor. Fix marketing-workflow-audit model.

findings.title: Architecture-owned verifier path is green across all gates
findings.mechanism: Architecture independent verification: qualified_pass. Architecture verifier: pass. Loop integrity: both ok. Self-repair/self-improve: 25/25 loops covered (0 missing). Docs independent verifier: pass. Market intelligence consumption: machine-verifiable with 4 consumers. Checker: AGENT_ARCHITECTURE_OK.
findings.root_cause: Architecture-owned gates are healthy. Remaining risk is externalized to marketing outcome evidence.
findings.recommended_fix: No architecture-side repair needed. Maintain current verification discipline.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Fix marketing-workflow-audit context overflow escalation (27 repeats)
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Critical escalation — 27 consecutive context-overflow failures. Switch model to larger-context provider (deepseek-v4-flash or pro) or split audit.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Eliminates the highest-count recurring error in the system.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Get fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Refreshed audit against current live view: 25 enabled, 0 disabled, 12 running, 2 last-error. One error is transient (marketing-momentum-watchdog gateway restart), one is real (marketing-workflow-audit context overflow at 27 repeats).

repairs_applied_this_run.target: architecture verifier + independent verification + loop integrity + self-repair/self-improve
repairs_applied_this_run.change: Reconfirmed: checker AGENT_ARCHITECTURE_OK, verifier pass, independent verification qualified_pass, loop integrity both ok, self-repair/self-improve 25/25 coverage with 0 missing, docs verifier pass, market intelligence consumption 4 consumers confirmed.

Live topology now shows 2 last-error jobs (vs 0 in prior snapshot). marketing-momentum-watchdog errored due to gateway restart interruption (consecutive_errors=1, transient). This was not surfaced in the prior audit which claimed 0 last-error.

independent_verification.summary: Architecture independent verification confirms: (1) architecture verifier fails closed on stale signoff, (2) live loop topology/ownership checks remain green, (3) shared market-intelligence reuse stays machine-verifiable, (4) self-repair/self-improve covers 25/25 loops with 0 missing. Verdict: qualified_pass.

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: Marketing-workflow-audit escalation: 27 consecutive context-overflow failures
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: Critical escalation at 27 repeats. Marketing independent verification also fails closed on primary-repo adoption evidence.
